sources.title: Home Invasion – Dieses Haus gehört mir (HORROR THRILLER ganzer Film Deutsch, Horrorfilme streamen)

metadata.Plot: Terror arrives at the one place we all feel safest in this taut psychological thriller starring Natasha Henstridge. When a wealthy woman and her stepson are targeted by a trio of expert thieves in their remote mansion, her only form of help comes from a call with a security systems specialist. But as the intruders become increasingly hostile and the connection wavers, will she trust him to be her eyes and navigate her to safety?
metadata.Actors: Jason Patric, Scott Adkins, Natasha Henstridge, William Dickinson
